creator: vd@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Dmitry, 

Can you please provide the advised information: 
/usr/work/usr/ports/graphics/hugin/work/hugin-0.6.1/config.log 
and an overview of all packages installed on your system (e.g. an `ls 
/var/db/pkg`) 

Can you also provide the output of the command 
make -C /usr/work/usr/ports/graphics/hugin -V LOCALBASE 

(you can send these privately to me or upload them somewhere if the 
output is too big) 

Thanks!
